title: [Metadata] Add Spring Boot hints and additional metadata export
description: Follow-up from 0.2.0 hardening: add Spring Boot metadata hints, @PropertyHint/@HintValue/@PropertyProvider annotations, and export additional-spring-configuration-metadata.json for IDE/tooling integration.

title: [Gradle] Auto-configure API and annotation processor dependencies
description: Follow-up from 0.2.0 hardening: make the Gradle plugin optionally add spring-properties-md-api and spring-properties-md-processor dependencies for Java projects while allowing version override.

title: [Skills] Canonicalize Codex/Claude skills
description: Restructure repo skills into canonical .codex/skills/<skill>/SKILL.md (like ad-marketplace/.codex/skills/prd). Cover: (1) install via JitPack (Maven/Gradle), (2) troubleshooting/common errors, (3) full annotation reference and purpose, (4) validate skill format (skill-creator quick_validate).

title: [Skills] Add Codex/Claude skill: use spring-properties-md via JitPack
[Compatibility] Evaluate Java 17 baseline and CI matrix
description: Follow-up from 0.2.0 hardening: evaluate lowering the library baseline to Java 17 and add a CI matrix covering supported Java and Spring Boot versions.
